name: Crispy Mackerel
tagline: Crisp-skinned mackerel with ponzu, scallion, and grated daikon

hero.alt: Crispy-skin mackerel with grated daikon and ponzu
hero.caption: mackerel — crisp skin

steps.title: Score the skin
steps.detail: Pat mackerel dry. Score skin in 3–4 shallow diagonals — prevents curling. Salt skin-side; rest 5 min, pat off moisture.
steps.tip: Salt draws water out for the crispiest skin imaginable.

steps.title: Whisk ponzu
steps.detail: Whisk soy, yuzu juice, mirin in a small bowl.
steps.tip: Bottled ponzu is fine — but homemade is brighter.

steps.title: Sear skin-down hard
steps.detail: Heat oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high. Place mackerel skin-down; press flat 30 sec. Cook 4 min skin-side until crisp; flip 90 sec.
steps.tip: Don't move the fish during the skin sear. Movement = stuck.

steps.title: Plate with daikon
steps.detail: Plate mackerel skin-up. Squeeze excess water from grated daikon; pile alongside. Top with scallions; drizzle ponzu.
steps.tip: Daikon takes the edge off oily fish — that's Japanese balance.

healthFacts: Mackerel is omega-3 dense and budget-friendly — undervalued fish.
Daikon's enzymes (myrosinase) aid digestion of oily fish.
